meta_title: For Founders: SaaS pricing to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS pricing to Solve can't finish projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling. Learn how to implement SaaS pricing to fuel development and overcome project paralysis with this expert-led guide for AI Founders.
content.answer_block: You aren't failing to finish because of code; you're failing because of a lack of market feedback. By implementing a SaaS pricing model early, you force validation. Monetization creates accountability. Use Claude Code to automate the infrastructure, allowing you to ship, price, and pivot before perfectionism kills your momentum.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is littered with 'perfect' codebases that never saw a single dollar of revenue. You are trapped in the purgatory of infinite feature creep, convinced that one more refactor will make your product ready for the world. But the silence from your empty checkout page is the only metric that matters.

Real, high-growth products aren't built in a vacuum of perfection; they are forged in the fires of user feedback. By shifting your focus from 'finishing' to 'monetizing,' you align your engineering efforts with business reality. It is time to stop building for yourself and start building for a market that is willing to pay for your solution.

steps.title: Define Your Value-Based Tiers
steps.description: Stop pricing based on features and start pricing based on the value you provide. Create three tiers: Entry (Validation), Pro (Growth), and Enterprise (Scale).
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current SaaS feature set and suggest a three-tier pricing structure based on 'value-to-customer' metrics rather than resource consumption.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Generate a pricing-schema.json file based on the suggested value-based tiers'.

steps.title: Implement Stripe Checkout Integration
steps.description: Don't build a custom billing engine. Use Stripe to handle the heavy lifting of compliance, taxes, and recurring cycles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure Stripe checkout session handler using Node.js and the Stripe SDK, ensuring it maps to my user database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add stripe-sdk && claude run --instruction 'Implement payment webhook handling'.

steps.title: Build a Usage-Limiting Middleware
steps.description: Prevent churn and abuse by gating features based on the user's active subscription tier.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a scalable middleware that checks user subscription status against an API route and blocks access if limits are exceeded.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Apply subscription-check middleware to all /api/v1/generate endpoints'.

steps.title: Automate Growth-Driven Metrics
steps.description: Integrate analytics to track when users hit their limits, signaling a perfect time to upsell.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a tracking script to monitor feature usage frequency and trigger an upsell notification when a user hits 80% of their tier limit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Inject analytics hooks into the core application loop'.

steps.title: Launch the 'Founder's Beta'
steps.description: Ship your pricing page today. If no one clicks 'Subscribe', your product needs a pivot, not more code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a high-converting pricing page UI component using Tailwind CSS that highlights the 'Pro' tier.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --instruction 'Deploy the pricing page to the staging environment for final review'.

pro_tips: Always price your entry tier high enough to filter out 'tire-kickers' who will only drain your support time.
Use 'anchoring': place your most profitable plan in the center and make it visually distinct from the others.
Implement a 'grandfathered' discount for your first 10 users to build immediate social proof and revenue.
If your churn rate is high, your pricing is likely fine, but your onboarding is failing to demonstrate value.
Automate the 'dunning' process (payment failure recovery) immediately; it is the easiest revenue you will ever recover.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing is live, shift your focus entirely to cold outreach and content marketing. Your goal is 10 paying customers in 30 days.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your vision rot in a private repo. Revenue is the only objective metric of success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

Don't build a custom billing engine. Use Stripe to handle the heavy lifting of compliance, taxes, and recurring cycles.
Prevent churn and abuse by gating features based on the user's active subscription tier.
Integrate analytics to track when users hit their limits, signaling a perfect time to upsell.
Ship your pricing page today. If no one clicks 'Subscribe', your product needs a pivot, not more code.
